mapper.select: SELECT category_id, user_id, name, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM todo_categories WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT category_id, user_id, name, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM todo_categories WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo_categories ( user_id, name, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, 'ACTIVE', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE todo_categories SET name = #{name}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE todo_categories SET status = 'DELETED', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, deleted_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL
